message:
fix(parity): interp boundary conditions and radians/degrees dtype

- interp: use < and > instead of <= and >= for left/right fill values,
  matching NumPy behavior where boundary values return fp[0]/fp[-1]
- radians/degrees: convert integer input to float64 before operation,
  matching NumPy's output dtype behavior

fnp-python tests: 133 pass, 2 fail (repr-formatting only, not functional)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
